title: More Tools and Armor
description: This mod adds new Tool and Armor Types.
body:
[Wiki](https://github.com/MC-datapack/More_Tools_and_Armor/wiki)

This Mod adds new Tool and Armor Types


![Creative Tab](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d35db9e93aa826404db1f3adf3eab01b30c6fe3c.png)

# Types


<details>
<summary>Copper</summary>
    
    -sword: 5 Attack Damage, 1.6 Attack Speed, Durability: 121

    -axe: 9 Attack Damage, 0.8 Attack Speed, Durability: 121

    -pickaxe: 3 Attack Damage, 1.2 Attack Speed, Durability: 121

    -shovel: 4 Attack Damage, 1 Attack Speed, Durability: 121

    -hoe: 1 Attack Damage, 2 Attack Speed, Durability: 121

    -helmet: +2 Armor, Durability: 165

    -chestplate: +5 Armor, Durability: 240
    
    -leggings: +4 Armor, Durability: 225

    -boots: +1 Armor, Durability: 195

</details>

<details>
<summary>Budding Amethyst</summary>

    -sword: 7 Attack Damage, 1.6 Attack Speed, Durability: 500

    -axe: 9 Attack Damage, 1 Attack Speed, Durability: 500

    -pickaxe: 4 Attack Damage, 1.2 Attack Speed, Durability: 500

    -shovel: 5 Attack Damage, 1 Attack Speed, Durability: 500

    -hoe: 1 Attack Damage, 4 Attack Speed, Durability: 500

    -helmet: +3 Armor, +1 Armor Toughness, Durability: 220

    -chestplate: +7 Armor, +1 Armor Toughness, Durability: 320
    
    -leggings: +6 Armor, +1 Armor Toughness, Durability: 300

    -boots: +2 Armor, +1 Armor Toughness, Durability: 260

</details>



<details>
<summary>Emerald</summary>

    -sword: 7 Attack Damage, 1.6 Attack Speed, Durability: 375

    -axe: 9 Attack Damage, 1 Attack Speed, Durability: 375

    -pickaxe: 4 Attack Damage, 1.2 Attack Speed, Durability: 375

    -shovel: 5 Attack Damage, 1 Attack Speed, Durability: 375

    -hoe: 1 Attack Damage, 4 Attack Speed, Durability: 375

    -helmet: +3 Armor, Durability: 231

    -chestplate: +7 Armor, Durability: 336
    
    -leggings: +6 Armor, Durability: 315

    -boots: +2 Armor, Durability: 273

</details>


<details>
<summary>Obsdidian</summary>

    -sword: 9 Attack Damage, 1.4 Attack Speed, Durability: 1831

    -axe: 11 Attack Damage, 0.8 Attack Speed, Durability: 1831

    -pickaxe: 6 Attack Damage, 1.2 Attack Speed, Durability: 1831

    -shovel: 6 Attack Damage, 1 Attack Speed, Durability: 1831

    -hoe: 2 Attack Damage, 4 Attack Speed, Durability: 1831

    -helmet: +3 Armor, +4 Armor Toughness, +40 Knockback Resistance, Durability: 440

    -chestplate: +8 Armor, +4 Armor Toughness, +40 Knockback Resistance, Durability: 640
    
    -leggings: +6 Armor, +4 Armor Toughness, +40 Knockback Resistance, Durability: 600

    -boots: +3 Armor, +4 Armor Toughness, +40 Knockback Resistance, Durability: 520

</details>





# Other Items

-Budding Amethyst Crystal
    
    -used to craft Budding Amethyst Tools and Armor

    -obtained trough mining budding amethyst
